title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates!
